text:
if touch = r.options[:touch]
          if r.macro == :belongs_to
            ActiveRecord::Associations::Builder::BelongsTo.touch_record(self, changes_to_save, r.foreign_key, r.name, touch)
          elsif r.macro == :has_one
            ActiveRecord::Associations::Builder::HasOne.touch_record(self, r.name, touch)
          end
        end

if @cms_site.path.present? && !params[:site_id]
        if params[:cms_path]&.match(%r{\A#{@cms_site.path}})
          params[:cms_path].gsub!(%r{\A#{@cms_site.path}}, "")
          params[:cms_path]&.gsub!(%r{\A/}, "")
        else
          raise ActionController::RoutingError, "Site Not Found"
        end
      end

if defined?(::ActionText) && properties.try(:association?) && (match = /\Arich_text_(.+)\Z/.match properties.name) && properties.klass.to_s == 'ActionText::RichText'
    field = RailsAdmin::Config::Fields::Types.load(:action_text).new(parent, match[1], properties)
    fields << field
    true
  else
    false
  end

LUA_ZPOPBYSCORE = <<~LUA
        local key, now = KEYS[1], ARGV[1]
        local jobs = redis.call("zrange", key, "-inf", now, "byscore", "limit", 0, 1)
        if jobs[1] then
          redis.call("zrem", key, jobs[1])
          return jobs[1]
        end

def sidekiq_options(opts = {})
          # stringify 2 levels of keys
          opts = opts.to_h do |k, v|
            [k.to_s, (Hash === v) ? v.transform_keys(&:to_s) : v]
          end

          self.sidekiq_options_hash = get_sidekiq_options.merge(opts)
        end

def perform_async(*args)
        if @opts["sync"] == true
          perform_inline(*args)
        else
          @klass.client_push(@opts.merge("args" => args, "class" => @klass))
        end
      end

if action == "create"
        self.version = 1
      else
        collection = (ActiveRecord::VERSION::MAJOR >= 6) ? self.class.unscoped : self.class
        max = collection.auditable_finder(auditable_id, auditable_type).maximum(:version) || 0
        self.version = max + 1
      end

if (@site = ::Comfy::Cms::Site.find_by(id: id_param) || ::Comfy::Cms::Site.first)
      session[:site_id] = @site.id
    else
      I18n.locale = ComfortableMexicanSofa.config.admin_locale || I18n.default_locale
      flash[:danger] = I18n.t("comfy.admin.cms.base.site_not_found")
      return redirect_to(new_comfy_admin_cms_site_path)
    end

if join.is_a?(Arel::Nodes::Join)
            buckets[:join_node] << join
          elsif join.is_a?(CTEJoin)
            buckets[:join_node] << build_with_join_node(join.name)
          else
            raise "unknown class: %s" % join.class.name
          end

if ActiveSupport::JSON::Encoding.use_standard_json_time_format
        xmlschema(ActiveSupport::JSON::Encoding.time_precision).force_encoding(Encoding::UTF_8)
      else
        %(#{time.strftime("%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S")} #{formatted_offset(false)})
      end

if defined?(Spree::Auth::Engine) &&
            Gem::Version.new(Spree::Auth::VERSION) < Gem::Version.new("2.5.4") &&
            defined?(Spree::UsersController)
          Spree::UsersController.protect_from_forgery with: :exception
        end

if self.class.aasm(:"#{aasm_name}").state_machine.config.timestamps
          ts_setter = "#{aasm(aasm_name).to_state}_at="
          respond_to?(ts_setter) && send(ts_setter, ::Time.now)
        end

if to_state == ::AASM::NO_VALUE
        to_state = nil
      elsif !(to_state.respond_to?(:to_sym) && transitions.map(&:to).flatten.include?(to_state.to_sym))
        # to_state is an argument
        args.unshift(to_state)
        to_state = nil
      end

def skip?
          ENV['DATABASE_CLEANER_ALLOW_REMOTE_DATABASE_URL'] ||
            DatabaseCleaner.allow_remote_database_url ||
            DatabaseCleaner.url_allowlist
        end

def del(*args)
      args.flatten!(1)
      keys_per_node = args.group_by { |key| node_for(key) }
      keys_per_node.inject(0) do |sum, (node, keys)|
        sum + node.del(*keys)
      end
    end

def self.for(class_name)
        parts = class_name.split('::')
        name_deep_enough = parts.length >= 4
        new(name_deep_enough ? parts[2..] : parts.last(2))
      end

def time_for(item)
      if item.is_a?(Float)
        Time.at(item)
      else
        Time.at(item / 1000, item % 1000, :millisecond)
      end
    end

if uri.relative? || uri.scheme == "http" || uri.scheme == "https"
          body = ""
        else
          return [400, { Rack::CONTENT_TYPE => "text/plain; charset=utf-8" }, ["Invalid redirection URI"]]
        end

if uuid.match?(CANONICAL_UUID)
                uuid
              else
                uuid = uuid.delete("{}-").downcase
                "#{uuid[..7]}-#{uuid[8..11]}-#{uuid[12..15]}-#{uuid[16..19]}-#{uuid[20..]}"
              end

if pg_config[:variables]
            ENV["PGOPTIONS"] = pg_config[:variables].filter_map do |name, value|
              "-c #{name}=#{value.to_s.gsub(/[ \\]/, '\\\\\0')}" unless value == ":default" || value == :default
            end.join(" ")
          end

if hash_class == Digest::MD5 || hash_class == OpenSSL::Digest::MD5
        version = 3
      elsif hash_class == Digest::SHA1 || hash_class == OpenSSL::Digest::SHA1
        version = 5
      else
        raise ArgumentError, "Expected OpenSSL::Digest::SHA1 or OpenSSL::Digest::MD5, got #{hash_class.name}."
      end

if /\d{2}\s?\/\s?\d{2,4}/.match?(expiry) # will match mm/yy and mm / yyyy
          expiry.delete(" ").split("/")
        elsif (match = expiry.match(/(\d{2})(\d{2,4})/)) # will match mmyy and mmyyyy
          [match[1], match[2]]
        end

if anchor
              path << "##{Journey::Router::Utils.escape_fragment(anchor.to_param)}"
            end

if mariadb?
          database_version >= "10.2.1"
        else
          database_version >= "8.0.1"
        end

if mariadb?
          database_version >= "10.6.0"
        else
          database_version >= "8.0.0"
        end

if Mongoid::VERSION.to_f >= 4
            set(Hash[attribute_name, value])
          else
            set(attribute_name, value)
          end

if id < ID_PARTITION_LIMIT
          ("%09d".freeze % id).scan(/\d{3}/).join("/".freeze)
        else
          ("%012d".freeze % id).scan(/\d{3}/).join("/".freeze)
        end

if req_args[0].is_a?(Hash)
            record.__send__(subject, **req_args[0])
          else
            record.__send__(subject, *req_args)
          end

PROCTITLES = [
  proc { "sidekiq" },
  proc { Sidekiq::VERSION },
  proc { |me, data| data["tag"] },
  proc { |me, data| "[#{Processor::WORK_STATE.size} of #{me.config.total_concurrency} busy]" },
  proc { |me, data| "stopping" if me.stopping? }
]

if html5?
          input_html_options[:type] ||= "range"
          input_html_options[:step] ||= 1
        end

unless after[2] == "[" && after.end_with?("]") && (child_key = after[3, after.length - 4]) && !child_key.empty? && !child_key.index("[") && !child_key.index("]")
            # Handle other nested array parameters
            child_key = after[2, after.length]
          end

if defined?(Test::Unit::AutoRunner.need_auto_run = ())
        Test::Unit::AutoRunner.need_auto_run = false
      elsif defined?(Test::Unit.run = ())
        Test::Unit.run = false
      end
